name: Yogurt Herb Bread
recipeIngredient: 5 1/2 cups all-purpose flour (6 1/2 cups, if needed)
1/4 teaspoon each dried oregano, thyme and basil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine 2 1/2 cups flour, yeast, sugar, and salt.
2. In a small saucepan, heat water and yogurt to 120-130°F.
3. Add the warm liquid mixture to the flour mixture; mix well.
4. Add oil, herbs, and enough remaining flour to form a stiff dough.
5. Turn dough onto a floured surface; knead until smooth and elastic, about 6-8 minutes.
6. Place in a greased bowl, turning once to grease the top.
7. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 1 hour.
8. Punch down dough; shape into two loaves.
9. Place shaped loaves in two greased 8x4x2 inch loaf pans.
10. Cover and let rise until doubled, about 1 hour.
11. Preheat oven to 375°F.
12. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from pans to cool on wire racks.
